summary: Iteration 39: Widget API and Frontend Testing - All features working correctly. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All widget features verified working.

minor.issue: Preflight OPTIONS requests are intercepted by global CORS middleware before reaching widget's custom CORS handlers. GET requests work correctly with custom CORS headers.
minor.note: This is expected behavior - for full external embedding support, widget origins should be added to global CORS config in server.py

action_items: OPTIONAL: For full external embedding support, add widget allowed origins to global CORS middleware in server.py (lines 74-82). Currently GET requests work with custom CORS headers, but OPTIONS preflight is handled by global middleware.
critical_code_review_comments: Widget implementation is clean and well-structured with proper CORS handling for GET requests
embed.js is self-contained with scoped CSS classes (cnx- prefix) to avoid conflicts
Demo page correctly loads embed.js dynamically with same-origin API base

test_credentials.note: Widget endpoints are public, no auth required

context_for_next_testing_agent: Widget feature fully tested and working. All endpoints verified: /api/widget/search, /api/widget/article/{id}, /api/widget/document/{id}/preview, /api/widget/demo. CORS headers work correctly for GET requests from allowed origins. embed.js creates all DOM elements programmatically with cnx- prefixed classes.

widget_search.valid_query: PASS - GET /api/widget/search?q=Reise returns articles and documents arrays
widget_search.result_structure: PASS - Articles have article_id, title, snippet, type; Documents have document_id, filename, type

widget_article.structure: PASS - Returns article_id, title, content, tags, breadcrumb, author, updated_at

widget_document.structure: PASS - Returns document_id, filename, file_type, has_file, html_content, extracted_text

cors_handling.disallowed_origin: PASS - No CORS header for https://evil.com

demo_page.loads: PASS - GET /api/widget/demo returns HTML with CANUSA Nexus title

frontend_widget.demo_page_loads: PASS - Demo page header and widget container found
frontend_widget.search_input: PASS - Search input with placeholder 'Suche in der Wissensdatenbank...'
frontend_widget.search_results: PASS - Typing triggers search, results grouped by 'ARTIKEL' and 'DOKUMENTE'
frontend_widget.article_popup: PASS - Clicking article opens popup with full content
frontend_widget.document_popup: PASS - Clicking document opens popup with preview (CSV table rendered)
frontend_widget.popup_close: PASS - X button closes popup correctly
frontend_widget.search_highlighting: PASS - Search terms highlighted with yellow background (cnx-highlight class)

cors_implementation_notes.custom_cors_in_widget_router: widget.py lines 30-48 - get_cors_headers() and cors_response() add CORS headers for allowed origins
cors_implementation_notes.get_requests: Work correctly with custom CORS headers
cors_implementation_notes.options_preflight: Intercepted by global CORSMiddleware in server.py before reaching widget handlers
cors_implementation_notes.recommendation: For full external embedding, add widget origins to global CORS config or use a more specific middleware ordering
